---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem would this solve, or what need does it address? (e.g. "As a chair, I want
… so that …")

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you prefer the proposed one.

## Scope / area

- [ ] Frontend (Next.js)
- [ ] Backend (FastAPI)
- [ ] AI / Mission-Bot
- [ ] Program review / planning workflow
- [ ] Infra / deployment
- [ ] Docs

## Additional context

Mockups, links, or references that help explain the request.
